data.body: MILESTONE: all 13 children of heedless-caloric-pikeperch CLOSED + SIGNED (completion-verified). Two completion-verifier findings caught+remediated: 3775 (docs index missed sample-ticket-log.jsonl → added) and e699 (AC promised a two_clones integration test; had only a unit mock → wrote the real integration test asserting a non-ff push-retry merge under the lock loses no events). Gerrit changes 420-423 re-verifying after the e699 fixup; 411-419 fully green. Epic closing; will submit change 423 (submits ancestors → lands stack on main) once all 13 are Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1.
